mapper.select: select id, code, label, parent_id, node_level, sort_order, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at from industry_sector where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select id, code, label, parent_id, node_level, sort_order, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at from industry_sector where code = #{code} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select id, code, label, parent_id, node_level, sort_order, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at from industry_sector where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_deleted = 0 order by sort_order ASC, id ASC
select count(*) from industry_sector where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
insert into industry_sector
code, label, parent_id, node_level, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
#{code}, #{label}, #{parentId}, #{nodeLevel}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW()
mapper.update: update industry_sector set is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
